text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
That was too close for comfort. I was nearly late
today! You see, something froze my legs in their
tracks.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if you know this. The morning dew on
the grass near the river... If you look closely at
the droplets, you can see the whole world inside,
upside down.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing more boring to me than going
straight to the academy. I'd miss this whole
unknown universe beneath my feet.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
But no worries, I made it in time! Hehe, it pays to
be an Umamusume.
